## Summary
Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / config

## Testing
Describe how you tested this change.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass: `dotnet test`
- [ ] Build passes without warnings: `dotnet build`
- [ ] No hardcoded IDs or connection strings
- [ ] All new services registered in `Program.cs`
- [ ] New entities have a migration
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] PR title follows convention: `[type] short description`
